enrichment.summary: Kyle responds to a viewer request about cheeseburgers, sharing his love for them despite rarely eating them, discussing the American origins of hamburgers, concerns about 'pink slime' in ground beef, and naming McDonald's Big Mac and fries as his favorites. He also touches on meat-eating culture in America versus Argentina and his preferred burger toppings.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: McDonald's Big Mac is his top pick
McDonald's fries are best due to crispiness and perfect salt distribution
not enough salt and not crispy enough
disgusted by it — calls it gross
puts everything on — cheese, lettuce, tomato, ketchup, mustard
